tiktok.caption: You probably have $175 in gift cards doing nothing right now — retailers DESIGNED it that way. They even have a name for your forgotten money 👀

youtube_short.title: Gift Cards Are a $3 Billion Trap (You're Holding Proof)
title_alternatives: Retailers Call Your Forgotten Gift Cards 'Breakage' — And Profit Billions
Why You Never Spend Gift Cards (It's Not an Accident)
youtube_short.description: The average American household is sitting on $175 in unused gift cards right now — and retailers have an internal accounting term for this. It's called 'breakage,' and it generates over $1 billion in annual profit. Every friction point you've ever felt with a gift card (the expiration fees, the limited merchants, the weird checkout fields) was engineered to stop you from spending. Americans are currently holding $21 billion in unspent gift card value total. Check your drawer, wallet, and old emails today — spend them or sell them on a resale site for up to 92 cents on the dollar. Don't let them keep your money. #giftcards #personalfinance #moneytips #retailpsychology #breakage

hook_line: YOUR DRAWER HAS $175 IN DEAD MONEY
